title: Chloanthes salviifolia

intro: Chloanthes salviifolia, also known as the Australian salvia bush, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Chloanthes salviifolia include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
